description: PaiCLI scripted long-session tasks for context-cost evaluation.

tasks.prompt: Rename getUserName to get_user_name across the package and tests, then verify it.

arguments.content:
from src.main import greeting
from src.profile import get_user_name
from src.report import render_user


def test_names():
    assert greeting({'name': ' ada '}) == 'Hello, Ada'
    assert get_user_name({'name': 'grace'}) == 'Grace'
    assert render_user({'name': 'alan'}) == 'User: Alan'

scripted_outputs.text: Renamed the function and updated all references.

llm_handoff.summary:
## Goal
Rename the user-name helper.

## Next Steps
Run the verifier.

verifier: from pathlib import Path; import ast; assert 'getUserName' not in ''.join(p.read_text() for p in Path('src').glob('*.py')); [ast.parse(p.read_text()) for p in Path('src').glob('*.py')]

tasks.prompt: Use error.log to fix process so it sums all input values, then verify it.

llm_handoff.summary:

verifier: from src.handler import process; assert process([1, 2, 3]) == 6

tasks.prompt: Add a health endpoint to the lightweight web app and add its focused test.

scripted_outputs.text: Added and tested the health endpoint.

llm_handoff.summary:

Add the health endpoint.

## Next Steps
Run the verifier.

verifier: from app import get; assert get('/health') == ({'status': 'ok'}, 200)

tasks.prompt: Migrate every service configuration from schema version 1 to version 2.

llm_handoff.summary:
## Goal
Migrate service schemas.

## Next Steps
Run the verifier.

verifier: from pathlib import Path; assert all('schema_version: 2' in p.read_text() for p in Path('services').glob('*/config.yaml'))

tasks.prompt: Upgrade requests to 2.31 and remove the unsafe request defaults from all call sites.

scripted_outputs.text: Upgraded the dependency and hardened the call sites.

llm_handoff.summary:
## Goal
Upgrade requests and fix defaults.

## Next Steps
Run the verifier.

verifier: from pathlib import Path; import ast; assert Path('requirements.txt').read_text().strip() == 'requests==2.31'; [ast.parse(p.read_text()) for p in Path('src').glob('*.py')]
